name: continuity-vault
description: Source-preserving extraction, knowledge promotion, graph routing, recall, and staleness auditing.

interface.shortDescription: Keep reusable knowledge findable and trustworthy.
interface.longDescription: Continuity Vault routes work through source-preserving extraction, governed promotion, relationship mapping, recall, and staleness audits while keeping workspace files authoritative.
defaultPrompt: Extract reusable knowledge from this source without replacing it.
Decide where this knowledge belongs and preserve its authority.
Audit these sources for staleness and instruction conflicts.
